summary: China is choking shipments of some critical minerals to Japan, a slowdown that’s hurting companies and prompting calls for Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi to find a diplomatic off-ramp with Beijing.

title: Oil Holds Drop as More Tankers Cross Hormuz After Peace Talks
title_cn: 和谈后更多油轮穿越霍尔木兹，油价持续下跌
summary: Oil held declines as more tankers openly cross the Strait of Hormuz, with the US and Iran making progress toward ending the war.

title: UAE Oil Exports Surge to 85% of Pre-War Levels, IEA Says
title_cn: IEA称阿联酋石油出口激增至战前水平的85%
summary: Oil exports from the United Arab Emirates in early June recovered to nearly 85% of the country’s pre-Iran war levels — rebounding even before Washington and Tehran inked an interim peace deal as the Gulf nation drew on pipelines, storage and alternate shipping routes, according to a report from the International Energy Agency.

title: Asian Stocks Set to Extend AI Chip-Fueled Selloff: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 亚洲股市将扩大人工智能芯片引发的抛售：市场总结

title: Couche-Tard Shares Hit Record as High Fuel Prices Bring Surging Profit
title_cn: 高油价带来利润飙升，Couche-Tard 股价创下历史新高
summary: Gas station and convenience store operator Alimentation Couche-Tard Inc. saw big gains in fuel margins after the war in the Middle East caused prices to spike. The shares hit a record.

title: Ship Insurers Set for Major Claims From Iran War, Allianz Says
title_cn: 安联表示，船舶保险公司将因伊朗战争而面临重大索赔
summary: The insurance industry is set to face significant claims for ships that were damaged during the Iran war, according to Allianz SE.

title: MSCI Delays Indonesia’s Market Status Review Until November
title_cn: MSCI 将印度尼西亚市场状况审查推迟至 11 月
summary: MSCI Inc. again decided to postpone its review on Indonesian equities, saying it needs more time to see whether recently announced transparency reforms are effective.

title: Colombia Gas Reserves Stay Near 18-Year Low as Shortfall Deepens
title_cn: 哥伦比亚天然气储量接近 18 年低点，缺口加剧
summary: Colombia’s natural gas reserves remained near their lowest level in almost two decades in 2025, increasing pressure on the nation to secure additional import capacity as a domestic shortfall deepens.

title: Black-Market Peptides Fuel a Multibillion-Dollar Gold Rush
title_cn: 黑市肽助推数十亿美元的淘金热
summary: Bloomberg's Madison Muller and Amanda Mull break down a rising black-market trend in the 'wellness' space, as customers look for more shots to fix issues like sleep or weight following the success of GLP-1s. However, Muller says that the drugs carry a risk, whether it's using a non FDA tested substance or user error around the injection itself.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: MSCI Upgrades Bulgaria to Frontier; Vietnam, Argentina Unchanged
title_cn: MSCI 将保加利亚升级为前沿；越南、阿根廷 不变
summary: MSCI Inc. reclassified Bulgaria as a frontier market, while indicating no changes to Argentina’s and Vietnam’s status in its latest review of global stock indexes.

title: E11EVEN Miami Operating Partner on World Cup Strategy
title_cn: E11EVEN迈阿密世界杯战略运营合作伙伴
summary: Gino LoPinto, who runs the highest grossing nightclub per square foot in the United States explains that the World Cup serves not only as a global sporting event but also as a significant economic catalyst for the hospitality industry. The conversation emphasizes how Miami's nightlife and hospitality sectors are benefiting from the influx of visitors, with the nightclub playing a key role in driving revenue during the tournament. He speaks with Romaine Bostick & Isabelle Lee on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: China Targets US Rare Earths Firms in Response to Pentagon
title_cn: 中国针对美国稀土公司作为对五角大楼的回应
summary: Gracelin Baskaran, director of the critical minerals security program at the Center for Strategic and International Studies, said that while the US has made 'unprecedented' moves to invest billions of dollars in rare earths infrastructure to compete with China, it is still a long term process as investment grows and technology gets more advanced.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: MSCI Maintains Korea’s Emerging Market Status in Latest Review
title_cn: MSCI 在最新审查中维持韩国的新兴市场地位
summary: MSCI Inc. kept South Korea in its emerging-market index and refrained from starting a formal review process that could eventually elevate the $5 trillion stock market to developed-market status.

title: NYC Tourism & Conventions CEO on World Cup’s Impact
title_cn: 纽约市旅游局首席执行官谈世界杯的影响
summary: Julie Coker, President and CEO of the New York City Tourism and Conventions Bureau, discussed the significant influx of visitors to the New York City area following the Knicks' NBA championship win and the kickoff of the World Cup on June 11. She noted that the city has seen a substantial increase in foot traffic from both domestic and international visitors, frequenting bars, restaurants, and traveling to nearby New Jersey for matches. She speaks with Romaine Bostick & Isabelle Lee on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: 【今朝の5本】仕事を始める前に読んでおきたい厳選ニュース

summary: Zohran Mamdani is gambling that the voters who came out in droves last year to make him New York City’s mayor will help send a group of his allies to Washington.

title: Pemex and Petrobras to Team Up in Hunt for Mexican Pre-Salt
title_cn: 墨西哥国家石油公司和巴西国家石油公司将联手寻找墨西哥盐下层
summary: The national oil companies of Mexico and Brazil agreed to work together to discover, produce and refine oil as both Latin American energy giants push to expand their reserves.

title: AI Boom Sees Investors Shift From Japan’s Value to Growth Stocks
title_cn: 人工智能的繁荣让投资者从日本的价值股转向成长型股票
summary: Japanese equities, long regarded by global investors as a value market, are beginning to attract growth funds, as AI-linked firms power to the top of market-cap rankings, beating out the manufacturers and telecoms giants that dominated for decades.

title: EM Assets Sink as Strong Dollar, Korea Tech Rout Hit Markets
title_cn: 美元走强、韩国科技股溃败冲击市场，新兴市场资产下跌
summary: Emerging-market assets tumbled across the board on Tuesday as the dollar climbed to its strongest level of the year and a risk-off mood triggered by a steep selloff in South Korean technology shares rippled through global markets.

title: Macquarie Slashes Brent Forecast, Sees Rapid Recovery of Flows
title_cn: 麦格理大幅下调布伦特原油预测，预计流量将迅速恢复
summary: Macquarie Group Ltd. slashed its projected oil prices for 2026 and 2027 in anticipation of a rapid return to normal flows of oil leaving the Middle East.

title: Morgan Stanley Caps Private Credit Fund After 11.6% Exit Request
title_cn: 摩根士丹利在 11.6% 退出请求后限制私人信贷基金
summary: A $7 billion private credit fund run by Morgan Stanley is capping investor withdrawals at 5%, allowing less than half of the redemptions shareholders requested in the second quarter.

title: Options Market Challenges Futures Aggressive Fed Hike Bets
title_cn: 期权市场挑战期货激进的美联储加息押注
summary: Options traders are building up bets that the broader market overreacted to the Federal Reserve’s hawkish pivot when it priced in a series of interest-rate hikes in the US starting later this year.

title: Dollar Jumps to Highest Since November on Fed Rate Hike Bets
title_cn: 美联储加息押注推动美元跃升至11月以来最高水平
summary: The dollar hit the highest level since November on Tuesday as traders cement views on the Federal Reserve hiking interest rates this year.

title: Cyber Firm Varonis Weighs Sale After Takeover Interest
title_cn: 网络公司 Varonis 考虑在收购后出售
summary: Cybersecurity company Varonis Systems Inc. is exploring options including a potential sale after receiving takeover interest, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: FedEx Projects Profit Growth This Year
title_cn: 联邦快递预计今年利润增长
summary: FedEx earnings for the fiscal fourth quarter topped Wall Street estimates and the courier is projecting that profit will grow this year. The results suggest cost-cutting efforts are working. Peter McNally of Third Bridge breaks down the earnings on "Bloomberg The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Call for Crop Sales to Iran Met With Skepticism by Traders
title_cn: 特朗普呼吁向伊朗出售农作物遭到贸易商质疑
summary: President Donald Trump’s call for Iran to buy US crops as part of a peace deal is being met with a mix of doubt and cautious optimism by the American farm sector.

title: Global Selloff in Equity Markets | Closing Bell
title_cn: 全球股市抛售|结束钟声
summary: Comprehensive cross-platform coverage of the U.S. market close on Bloomberg Television, Bloomberg Radio, and YouTube with Romaine Bostick, Katie Greifeld, Carol Massar and Tim Stenovec. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Treasuries See Good Auction Demand as Rate-Hike Bets Trimmed
title_cn: 随着加息押注减少，国债拍卖需求良好
summary: Treasuries rose as a selloff in US stocks and further declines in oil prices curbed wagers on Federal Reserve interest-rate increases over the coming year.

title: Stock Traders Scour for Technical Levels to Lure Dip Buyers
title_cn: 股票交易员寻找技术水平以吸引逢低买入
summary: The rout in US stocks has brought the S&P 500 Index to a crucial inflection point. Chart watchers are now scouring key technical thresholds for clues on whether the worst of the selloff is over.

title: Anthropic Customer Sues US Over Loss of Fable AI Access
title_cn: Anthropic 客户因失去 Fable AI 访问权限而起诉美国
summary: An artificial intelligence startup that uses Anthropic PBC’s AI models sued the US over a government order that the maker of Claude and Mythos keep its most advanced technology out of the hands of foreign nationals.

title: German Rail Halted Nationwide Services After Radio System Outage
title_cn: 无线电系统中断后，德国铁路停止了全国服务
summary: Germany’s national rail operator temporarily halted services countrywide late on Tuesday after an outage of its communication system.

title: Cerebras Drops After 2026 Sales Outlook Disappoints Investors
title_cn: Cerebras 2026 年销售前景令投资者失望，股价下跌
summary: Cerebras Systems Inc. shares fell about 10% in late trading after the newly public chipmaker gave an annual sales forecast that disappointed investors looking for the company to take a bigger slice of the AI data center market.

title: SpaceX’s $25 Billion Sale Meets Skeptical Eyes of Debt Investors
title_cn: SpaceX 250 亿美元的出售遭到债务投资者的怀疑
summary: Credit-rating firms said SpaceX is a solid investment-grade company. The bond market is taking a more cautious view.

title: Digital Credit Could Be $3T Market: Cole
title_cn: 数字信贷可能是 3T 美元的市场：Cole
summary: Matt Cole, CEO of Strive, joins Scarlet Fu and Tim Stenovec on "Bloomberg Crypto." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Meta’s Cox Sought Shah’s WhatsApp Advice — Then Made Him Leader
title_cn: Meta 的 Cox 寻求 Shah 的 WhatsApp 建议 –然后任命他为领袖
summary: Meta Platforms Inc.’s decision to hand leadership of WhatsApp to Kunal Shah, one of India’s most prominent angel investors and the founder of fintech startup Cred, started with a cold email.

title: The Growing Crisis for America's Child Abuse Investigators
title_cn: 美国虐待儿童调查人员面临的日益严重的危机
summary: With the proliferation of AI-generated abuse material, police and investigators aren't getting the robust mental health support they need.

title: GameStop CEO Drops $35 Billion Pay Plan to Focus on eBay Bid
title_cn: GameStop CEO 放弃 350 亿美元薪酬计划，专注于 eBay 竞购
summary: GameStop Corp. Chief Executive Officer Ryan Cohen withdrew a bonus plan that could have paid him as much as $35 billion so that his company can be “fully focused on GameStop’s operating performance and its proposed eBay acquisition.”

title: FDA Drops Complaint Against Whoop’s Blood Pressure Tracking Tool
title_cn: FDA 撤销对 Whoop 血压追踪工具的投诉
summary: The US Food and Drug Administration dropped its complaint against fitness tracker brand Whoop Inc. over its blood-pressure tracking tool, marking an about-face after the agency initially asked the company to disable it.

title: BOE Sets $52.8B Stablecoin Cap and Drops Holding Limit
title_cn: BOE 设置 $52.8B 稳定币上限并降低持有限额
summary: Bloomberg's Anna Irrera joins Scarlet Fu and Tim Stenovec on "Bloomberg Crypto." The Bank of England has scrapped plans to limit how much firms and households can hold in UK stablecoins and instead introduced a temporary £40 billion ($52.8 billion) cap for the total issuance of each coin. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Top Energy Fund Likes Japan Stocks That Power AI Efficiently
title_cn: 顶级能源基金看好能够有效推动人工智能的日本股票
summary: One of the world’s best-performing energy funds is doubling down on companies that help data centers consume power more efficiently, with Japanese stocks among its top investments.

title: Cuomo to Lead Crypto Venture With New York Stock Exchange Owner
title_cn: 库莫将与纽约证券交易所所有者一起领导加密货币创业公司
summary: Bloobmerg's Katherine Doherty joins Scarlet Fu and Tim Stenovec on "Bloomberg Crypto." Former New York Governor Andrew Cuomo is starting a second act: Helping cryptocurrency exchange operator OKX and the owner of the New York Stock Exchange build a new business that merges digital and traditional finance markets. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: World Cup Mints Big Prediction Winners and Million-Dollar Losers
title_cn: 世界杯铸币大预测赢家和百万美元输家
summary: Yesha Yadav, professor of law and associate dean at Vanderbilt Law School, joins Scarlet Fu and Tim Stenovec on "Bloomberg Crypto." The World Cup is turning prediction markets into a public ledger of million-dollar bets, exposing big wins and dramatic losses as the tournament attracts more money to the fast-growing industry. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: AI Benefiting SF Real Estate: JPM’s Asset Mgt.’s Tredway
title_cn: 人工智能惠及顺丰地产：摩根大通资产管理公司的 Tredway
summary: Chad Tredway, Global Head of Real Estate at JPMorgan Asset Management, discussed the impact of the AI cycle on the real estate sector during a live financial news segment. While not directly investing in data centers, Tredway highlighted opportunities in the surrounding infrastructure and real estate that support AI operations. He speaks with Romaine Bostick & Isabelle Lee on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: CME Sues CFTC as Battle Over Perpetual Futures Heats Up
title_cn: 永续合约之争愈演愈烈，芝加哥商品交易所 (CME) 起诉美国商品期货交易委员会 (CFTC)
summary: Lindsay Lin, COO of Dragonfly, joins Scarlet Fu and Tim Stenovec on "Bloomberg Crypto." One day after longtime CME Group chief Terry Duffy announced he’d take a step back early next year, his exchange empire sued its top regulator in a battle over the surging crypto perpetual futures market. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Bloomberg Crypto 6/23/2026
title_cn: 彭博加密货币 6/23/2026
summary: "Bloomberg Crypto" covers the people, transactions, and technology shaping the world of decentralized finance. Today's guests: Strive CEO Matt Cole, Dragonfly COO Lindsay Lin, Vanderbilt Law School Professor & Associate Dean Yesha Yadav, and RWA Marketplace TX Co-Founder Ashely Ebersole. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SpaceX Shares Eke Out a Gain to Snap Three Day Losing Streak
title_cn: SpaceX 股价微涨，结束连续三天下跌
summary: SpaceX shares ended higher on Tuesday, snapping a three-day selloff that wiped out more than $600 billion from the Elon Musk-led rocket and satellite company’s market value.

title: Crypto-Treasury Dream Unravels After a 90% Stock Plunge
title_cn: 股价暴跌 90% 后加密货币国债梦想破灭
summary: Bloomberg's Maria Clara Cobo joins Scarlet Fu and Tim Stenovec on "Bloomberg Crypto." The business model of launching a public company to buy crypto is falling apart. As a result, those in the queue to do so through blank-check companies are facing pressure from investors against a market backdrop that is fiercely unfriendly. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Chip Stocks Plunge as AI Selloff Ripples Across From Asia
title_cn: 人工智能抛售席卷亚洲，美国芯片股暴跌
summary: Tuesday’s stock-market slide was what one Wall Street strategist called a “chip-wreck.”

title: US Chip Stocks Plunge as AI Selloff Ripples Across From Asia
title_cn: 人工智能抛售席卷亚洲，美国芯片股暴跌
summary: A global selloff in the shares of chipmakers dragged US indexes sharply lower amid doubts about the sustainability of the AI-fueled tech rally. Katherine Kostereva, CEO, Creatio joined Bloomberg Businessweek Daily to discuss.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Startup Hadrian Has Discussed New Funding at $7.5 Billion Value
title_cn: 初创公司 Hadrian 讨论了价值 75 亿美元的新融资
summary: Company runs AI-powered factories that aim to speed up manufacturing

title: Strive Is Buying Bitcoin Hand-Over-Fist, CEO Says
title_cn: 首席执行官表示，Strive 正在全力购买比特币
summary: Strive Inc. Chief Executive Officer Matt Cole says this is a great time to buy Bitcoin as the price keeps falling. He says their Bitcoin holdings are up to 20,000 from 5,000 last fall. He speaks on "Bloomberg Crypto." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: 25 African Startups to Watch | Bloomberg Next Africa
title_cn: 25 家值得关注的非洲初创公司 |彭博下一个非洲
summary: On this edition of Next Africa, we bring you Bloomberg's 2026 African startups to watch list. From Egypt to Mauritius, these companies are racing to solve some of the continent's toughest challenges. Plus, we hear from Moniepoint co-founder and CTO, Felix Ike, on building one of Africa's leading fintech platforms. We also speak with venture capital investors on opportunities and challenges of investing in the continent. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Supreme Court Puts Curbs on Human-Rights Suits in Cisco Win
title_cn: 最高法院在思科胜诉中限制人权诉讼
summary: A divided US Supreme Court put new limits on lawsuits against companies over atrocities abroad, rejecting a suit accusing Cisco Systems Inc. of complicity in China’s torture of Falun Gong adherents.

title: Meta Building Prediction Market App That Wouldn’t Wager Money
title_cn: 元构建预测市场应用程序，不会下注
summary: Meta Platforms Inc. Chief Executive Officer Mark Zuckerberg has directed a small team to create a prediction market application similar to Kalshi Inc. and Polymarket, but with lower stakes as users won’t likely wager real money.

title: Sequoia Backs Drone Startup Stark at €3.2 Billion Valuation
title_cn: 红杉资本以 32 亿欧元估值支持无人机初创公司 Stark
summary: Stark Defence, a startup making kamikaze drones, has raised €500 million ($570 million) in a fundraising round led by Sequoia Capital and Peter Thiel’s Founders Fund as private capital pours into European military technology.

title: PNC's Agati Sees Healthy Reset After Tech Rally
title_cn: PNC 的 Agati 在科技股上涨后看到了健康的重置
summary: US tech stocks join a global selloff as investors reassess the AI trade. Amanda Agati, Chief Investment Officer at PNC Asset Management Group, says the tech pullback is a healthy reset after an extraordinary run. She speaks on "Bloomberg Open Interest." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Rep. Kamlager-Dove: No 'Blank Check' for Pentagon
title_cn: 众议员卡姆拉格-多夫：五角大楼没有“空白支票”
summary: Democratic Representative Sydney Kamlager-Dove of California says she is not prepared to support additional Pentagon funding without more answers from Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth on Iran and depleted munitions stockpiles. She also says European allies raised concerns during her recent Brussels visit about US reliability on NATO, Ukraine and climate. She speaks with Kailey Leinz and Joe Mathieu on the late edition of Bloomberg's "Balance of Power." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Sen. Marshall Calls SAVE America Act His Top Priority
title_cn: 参议员马歇尔称拯救美国行动为首要任务
summary: Republican Senator Roger Marshall of Kansas says the SAVE America Act is the one bill he would choose to pass if he could pass only one more in his Senate career, as President Trump presses Congress to advance the measure. He also calls for "trust in the process" in Iran negotiations and says farmers will likely need more aid beyond any purchases Iran may make of US agricultural products. He speaks with Kailey Leinz and Joe Mathieu on the late edition of Bloomberg's "Balance of Power." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Sen. Alsobrooks Sees More Room for Bipartisan Deals
title_cn: 参议员艾尔索布鲁克斯认为两党交易有更多空间
summary: Democratic Senator Angela Alsobrooks of Maryland says the 21st Century ROAD to Housing Act shows Congress can still work in a bipartisan fashion to tackle affordability, arguing there are "many more opportunities" for lawmakers to do so. She also discusses the CLARITY Act and says crypto market structure legislation must include ethics protections around the President's family and other elected officials, as well as illicit finance provisions. She speaks with Kailey Leinz and Joe Mathieu on the late edition of Bloomberg's "Balance of Power." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: The US Era of Protecting Human Rights Is Over
title_cn: 美国保护人权的时代已经结束
summary: The Supreme Court ruled that non-US citizens can no longer sue in US courts over international human-rights violations. The American government’s abandonment of the cause is now complete, Bloomberg Opinion columnist and Harvard Law Professor Noah Feldman says. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: China’s Instagram Gets Ready To Go Public
title_cn: 中国 Instagram 准备上市
summary: Chinese social media app Xiaohongshu, or RedNote, is testing the nation’s mood for all things tech with a plan to go public in Hong Kong. Today on the Big Take Asia podcast, what RedNote’s push to list means.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: New Zealand’s National Party Hits Lowest Poll Level Since 2021
title_cn: 新西兰国家党民意调查跌至 2021 年以来最低水平
summary: New Zealand’s governing National Party fell to its lowest level of support since 2021 in a key opinion poll less than five months from a general election.

title: Tech Stocks Hit By Losses as AI Concerns Spread |Bloomberg Businessweek Daily 6/23/2026
title_cn: 随着人工智能担忧蔓延，科技股遭受损失 |《彭博商业周刊》日报 6/23/2026
summary: Bloomberg senior White House correspondent Josh Wingrove previews President Trump's speech at a Mack Truck facility in Pennsylvania. Then, Mary Ann Bartels, chief investment strategist at Sanctuary Wealth breaks down market reaction as AI stocks drive major indexes down. Plus, Katherine Kostereva, CEO of Creatio, dives even deeper into AI potential as companies revise workflow to incorporate new technology. Then, Sean Gadd, CEO of pool company Latham Group, gives a check on the state of the American consumer and who has the discretionary spending to build a swimming pool. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Defends Unfrozen Iran Funds as US Senate Votes to End War
title_cn: 美国参议院投票结束战争，特朗普捍卫未冻结的伊朗资金
summary: President Donald Trump said Iran will be able to use funds released from frozen accounts only to purchase food and medical supplies from the US, seeking to ease concerns about peace negotiations that both sides say are making progress.

title: China’s Crackdown Rattles the World’s Top Offshore Wealth Hub
title_cn: 中国的打压令世界顶级离岸财富中心感到不安
summary: The curbs are casting a pall over a luxury market boom in the world’s top offshore hub — and unnerving the ultra-rich.

title: US Senate Votes to End Iran War in Rebuke to Trump
title_cn: 美国参议院投票结束伊朗战争以谴责特朗普
summary: The Republican-led Senate voted for the first time to end the US war with Iran, breaking with President Donald Trump on an unpopular foreign conflict that has raised Americans’ cost of living, roiled markets and caused global economic fallout.

title: Trump’s Trip to US Capitol to Spotlight Warring Divisions in GOP
title_cn: 特朗普访问美国国会大厦以凸显共和党内的交战分歧
summary: President Donald Trump plans to spend a Wednesday excursion to the US Capitol demanding divisive voter ID legislation. Frustrated Republican senators have other ideas.

title: Trump’s Pennsylvania Visit Teases a Midterms Shift
title_cn: 特朗普的宾夕法尼亚之行预示着中期选举的转变
summary: Republicans were promised that the president would stump for them.

title: Slain Dissident’s Daughter Maps Out a Plan for Cuba After Communism
title_cn: 被杀持不同政见者的女儿为共产主义后的古巴制定了计划
summary: Rosa María Payá was 23 when her father died on his way to a pro-democracy meeting. With Donald Trump’s help, she’s now hoping to complete his mission.

title: Trump Curbs Iran’s Unfrozen Funds | Balance of Power 6/22/2026
title_cn: 特朗普限制伊朗未冻结资金|权力平衡 2026 年 6 月 22 日
summary: On the early edition of Balance of Power, Bloomberg Washington Correspondents Joe Mathieu and Kailey Leinz discuss the latest news from the Trump Administration. On today's show, American Petroleum Insitute President Mike Sommers, Stonecourt Capital Partner Rick Davis, Harvard Kennedy School Ash Center Visiting Democracy Fellow Jeanne Sheehan Zaino and States Project Co-Founder Daniel Squadron. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Vows Economy to Rebound as Iran Price Shocks Reverberate
title_cn: 特朗普誓言经济将在伊朗物价震荡回响之际反弹
summary: President Donald Trump touted his protectionist trade agenda to voters in the battleground state of Pennsylvania, turning his attention to the US economy following an interim deal to end the war with Iran.

title: Romania in Last-Ditch Push to Form Cabinet After Vote Fails
title_cn: 投票失败后罗马尼亚正在最后努力组建内阁
summary: Romanian President Nicusor Dan urged political parties to agree swiftly on support for a minority government to end weeks of turmoil that have stalled key reforms for crucial European Union funding.

title: NYC Heads to Polls With Democrats Split Over Age, AI, Israel
title_cn: 纽约市即将举行民意调查，民主党人在年龄、人工智能、以色列问题上存在分歧
summary: New York City is experiencing a highly contested Congressional primary season with a number of hotly contested races. The primaries will test the political strength of New York City Mayor Zohran Mamdani, who has endorsed several insurgent candidates against Democratic stalwarts, and will speak to demographic and generational shifts within the party. Daniel Squadron, former New York State Senator (D) and co-founder of The States Project, author of the new book "The Fourth Branch" joins to discuss on Balance of Power.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Grants Iran Football Team Extra Day Before World Cup Match
title_cn: 美国在世界杯比赛前为伊朗足球队提供额外一天的补助
summary: The Iranian national team will be granted an extra day in the US to prepare for its upcoming World Cup match, a Department of Homeland Security spokesperson said, the latest in an ongoing back and forth between the football team and its hosts.

title: Trump Administration, Qatar Say EU Methane Rules Threaten Energy Security
title_cn: 特朗普政府和卡塔尔称欧盟甲烷规则威胁能源安全
summary: The US, Qatar and other natural gas exporters are urging the European Union to ease some of its pending methane emissions rules, warning that the regulations could threaten the bloc’s energy security.

title: Italy Seeks to Mend Ties With the US After Trump-Meloni Blowout
title_cn: 特朗普-梅洛尼井喷后意大利寻求修复与美国的关系
summary: Italy’s Foreign Minister Antonio Tajani sought to mend fences with the US, saying the two countries should work to de-escalate tensions after a spat between President Donald Trump and Premier Giorgia Meloni.

title: US Sanctions Key Cuban Bank, Miner in Fresh Blow to Havana
title_cn: 美国制裁古巴主要银行和矿业公司对哈瓦那造成新打击
summary: The US sanctioned the Cuban military’s international banking arm and a state-run company that’s partnered with Trafigura Group and other miners, in the latest escalation of pressure against Havana’s communist leadership.

title: Welfare Fraud Costs UK £10 Billion as Burnham Vows Crackdown
title_cn: 伯纳姆发誓严厉打击福利欺诈，英国损失100亿英镑
summary: Fraud and error in the UK welfare system is costing the taxpayer £10 billion ($13 billion) a year, according to analysis by the government’s budget watchdog.

title: Maritime Watchdog to Start Evacuating Stranded Seafarers From Middle East
title_cn: 海事监管机构开始从中东撤离滞留海员
summary: The International Maritime Organization said it has received safety guarantees that could allow hundreds of ships to exit the Persian Gulf through the Strait of Hormuz, as it seeks to evacuate thousands of seafarers.

title: Trump Fast Deportation Rule Cleared by Appeals Court for Now
title_cn: 上诉法院暂时批准特朗普快速驱逐出境规则
summary: A divided US appeals court lifted a temporary hold on a Trump administration policy that allows federal agents to rapidly remove undocumented immigrants without due process from anywhere in the US if they can’t quickly prove they’ve been in the country for more than two years.

title: Six Arrested for Alleged Reflecting Pool Damage, Trump Says
title_cn: 特朗普称六人因涉嫌破坏倒影池而被捕
summary: President Donald Trump said that six people have been arrested for allegedly damaging the Lincoln Memorial’s Reflecting Pool, which has been plagued by algae and peeling paint after a renovation that he directed.

title: NY’s Pension Chief Faces First Democratic Challengers Since 2007
title_cn: 纽约养老金局长自 2007 年以来首次面临民主党挑战者
summary: New York Comptroller Thomas DiNapoli, who oversees the state’s $300 billion pension fund, is facing his first primary challenge since taking office nearly two decades ago as two rival Democrats try to seize on the progressive energy that propelled Mayor Zohran Mamdani to victory in November.

title: Canada Backs $504 Million Loan for Indigenous Nuclear Stake
title_cn: 加拿大支持为本土核股权提供 5.04 亿美元贷款
summary: Canada will make a C$715 million ($504 million) loan guarantee to a group of seven First Nations so they can buy a stake in a large nuclear project east of Toronto.

title: Supreme Court Revives $1 Billion Exxon Suit Over Cuba Assets
title_cn: 最高法院重启埃克森美孚针对古巴资产的 10 亿美元诉讼
summary: The Supreme Court sided with Exxon Mobil in its efforts to sue a Cuban conglomerate for operating oil and gas assets seized in 1960 following the country’s Communist Revolution.
